sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113613" key="xeirobrw/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χειρο-βρώς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῶτος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n113613.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gnawing the arms,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δεσμός</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0292.tlg001:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stesich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
